action.reasoning: Observation: Starting with empty workspace, first iteration. Analysis: Need quick baseline with 3D data + SchNet (from torch_geometric) for QM9 HOMO-LUMO regression; subsample data + small model + 2 epochs to validate pipeline fast and measure iter time without exceeding budgets. Decision: Write model.py/train.py/predict.py from scratch, train with L1 loss + logging to metrics.jsonl, save ckpt, submit_eval immediately for initial score and timing.
